CE1.justification: Acted directly with a reasoned refusal; required no clarifying questions or context-loading from the user.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact single paragraph, but a three-item enumeration plus a prescriptive closing sentence about discoverability stretch beyond what the task required.

CE3.justification: No routing occurred (refusal); the response states upfront that nothing was deleted and gives the reason in one clause.

CE4.justification: No filesystem actions taken; interruption at any point leaves the workspace untouched with no orphan artifacts.
